data.title: Johnny Lieberman of Harbor IT named Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2026 New York finalist by EY US
data.description: In New York on April 21, 2026, Johnny Lieberman, the CEO of Harbor IT, has been selected as one of the finalists for the Entrepreneur Of The Year 2026 New York Award presented by Ernst & Young LLP (EY US). This prestigious program, in its 41st year, recognizes innovative leaders who have made significant contributions to the business world. The award highlights their achievements and noteworthy success in entrepreneurship.

This is very important news. Samsung’s Xi’an fab is a critical facility that accounts for 35% of Samsung’s NAND output, and if production at the fab — previously 150,000 wafers per month — has been reduced by 5–6% due to the upgrade, NAND will become even tighter.

data.title: /U P D A T E -- Nuvation Bio Inc./
data.description: Nuvation Bio has shared updates on IBTROZI® (Taletrectinib) at AACR 2026, showing long-lasting responses in pivotal studies. The announcement was made on April 21, 2026, by Nuvation Bio Inc. The data presented highlights the durability of responses over an extended period. The company has indicated significant findings in the longer-term follow-up data.

data.title: Leaders Convene in NYC at ‘National Conference on Rent Control and Tenant Rights’
data.description: In New York City, a gathering of leaders recently took place at the 'National Conference on Rent Control and Tenant Rights.' The event brought together a significant number of participants to discuss important issues surrounding rent control and tenant rights. The conference aimed to address pressing concerns related to housing policies and regulations, with a focus on improving conditions for renters. It served as a platform for sharing insights and best practices to ensure the protection and well-being of tenants.

data.title: Kyverna Presents Registrational Trial Primary Analysis for Miv-cel in Stiff Person Syndrome Demonstrating Statistically Significant, Durable Clinical Benefit Across All Endpoints in an Oral, Late-Breaker Session at AAN Annual Meeting
data.description: A single dose of miv-cel has resulted in significant and long-lasting enhancements in mobility, improvement in disability scores, and the elimination of chronic immunotherapy requirements. These outcomes have not been seen before in patients with Stiff Person Syndrome (SPS).

data.title: Catholic Charities USA spreads hope with national advertising campaign
data.description: An advertising campaign has been initiated by Catholic Charities USA (CCUSA), the national association representing 169 Catholic Charities agencies in the US, urging individuals nationwide to spread hope through acts of service. This initiative commenced on April 21, 2026, in Alexandria, Virginia. The campaign aims to inspire people to engage in charitable activities and help those in need. CCUSA's efforts reach a network of 169 charity agencies serving communities across the United States.

data.title: Chicago Rivet & Machine Co. Announces Year-End Results of Operations
data.description: Warrenville, Illinois - April 21, 2026 - Chicago Rivet & Machine Co. (NYSE American: CVR) disclosed its audited financial outcomes for the fiscal year 2025. The company reported consolidated results of operations for the year ending on December 31, 2025. For further details, the complete report can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

data.title: TCL Launches its First UltraThin Designer Series Soundbar
data.description: TCL, a leading consumer electronics brand, is introducing its latest product, the TCL A65K UltraThin Designer Series Soundbar, in Irvine, California. This new soundbar aims to revolutionize home audio by combining big cinematic sound with a sleek and elegant design. As one of the top consumer electronics brands globally, TCL is setting a new standard for exceptional sound quality in a small form factor. This latest offering is poised to redefine the audio experience for consumers. Don't miss out on the opportunity to bring the ultimate sound experience into your home with the TCL A65K.

data.title: Illinois American Water Celebrates Earth Day with a Focus on Sustainable Operations & Water Source Protection
data.description: Belleville, Illinois on April 21, 2026 - Illinois American Water is emphasizing its dedication to safeguarding local water resources in celebration of Earth Day. The company is committing to environmental stewardship and making strategic investments in infrastructure to achieve this goal.

data.title: SMASHIFY LAUNCHES BETA PLATFORM TO REWRITE THE STREAMING EXPERIENCE FOR ARTIST AND FANS
data.description: A significant shift in music streaming is on the horizon as Smashify revealed its beta music platform on April 21, 2026, in Los Angeles. This innovative platform aims to revolutionize streaming services by fostering closer connections among artists, fans, and platform engagement. The launch signifies a move towards a more synchronized ecosystem in streaming music, potentially impacting the industry's dynamics.

data.title: Chicago Rivet & Machine Co. Announces Year-End Results of Operations
data.description: Warrenville, Illinois - On April 21, 2026, Chicago Rivet & Machine Co. (NYSE American: CVR) disclosed its audited financial outcomes for the year 2025. A breakdown of their consolidated operational results for 2024 and 2025 revealed changes in their net figures.

data.title: Interactive Brokers Earnings Meet Views Amid Higher Trading Activity. The Stock Is Falling
data.description: Interactive Brokers reported earnings in line with expectations, as trading activity remained robust. Despite this, IBKR stock declined later in the day and is on track to drop below a key buy threshold. The company's financial performance was in line with forecasts, reflecting elevated trading volumes. This news has led to a decrease in the stock price, signaling a potential buying opportunity for investors.

data.title: Why Robotics Giant Intuitive Surgical Dropped Despite Its Beat And Raise
data.description: In the first quarter, the leading robotic surgery company surpassed expectations and increased its guidance. Despite this, Intuitive Surgical experienced a drop in its stock value. The company's strong performance included exceeding analyst forecasts and raising its future outlook. This news was featured in an article on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Carvana Posts Amazing Profit Growth, Earns Rating Upgrade
data.description: Carvana's Relative Strength Rating has exceeded 80, indicating strong performance. The company has reported remarkable profit growth, leading to an upgrade in its rating. The news was shared through "Investor's Business Daily."

data.title: Enerflex Ltd. Announces Timing of First Quarter Financial and Operational Results and Schedules Virtual Investor Update
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta, on April 21, 2026, Enerflex Ltd. (TSX: EFX) (NYSE: EFXT) announced that it intends to reveal its financial outcomes and operational highlights for the first quarter of 2026, ending on March 31. The detailed report is scheduled to be disclosed to the public on Thursday, May 7, 2026, before the markets open. This information will be disseminated through a press release and will be accessible on Enerflex's official website (www.enerflex.com). It will also be accessible on the Company's electronic profiles on SEDAR+ and EDGAR at www.sedarplus.ca and www.sec.gov/edgar, respectively.
